title: Impact of Quantitative Easing on Emerging Markets
description: An empirical analysis of how major central bank policies affect capital flows and exchange rates in developing economies.

title: Carbon Pricing and Industrial Competitiveness
description: Investigating the long-term effects of carbon taxes on manufacturing output and innovation in the EU.

title: Digital Currency Adoption in Rural Areas
description: A field study on the behavioral barriers to adopting mobile banking and digital currencies in remote agricultural communities.
